name: agy
description: Google Antigravity CLI bridge for Claude Code: 1M-token long-context analysis (Gemini 3 Pro), Nano Banana image generation & editing (story, edit, restore, icon, pattern, diagram) via a wired MCP backend with an agy-direct fallback and explicit /agy:setup, Veo video generation, raw exec — filling capability gaps Claude Code cannot meet alone.
